finalAssistantMessages.text: The production status wrapper is using the deployed script version, so it doesn’t expose the newer covered/not-covered summary lines from the local file. I’m asking it for JSON once, in case the deployed output still includes structured counts we can use cleanly.

The JSON confirms the deployed status output has the same older shape, with the full remaining item array but no covered/not-covered split. I’m summarizing the saved remaining-row log by source so the final note is useful without dumping thousands of rows.

Import: 124 imported descriptions, 0 skipped. DB media still missing descriptions: 1344; not covered by this site queue: 1344. Human-review queue items: 0.
